message:
test(bd-1mls): add unit tests for tasks.rs edge cases

Cover cleanup_completed with missing/unparseable timestamps, debug output
with populated state, multiple handler types, list_tasks filter for
Failed/Cancelled statuses, progress notification content verification,
TaskStatusSnapshot with result, submit error message content, and cancel
result structure.

Server tests: 1263 → 1273

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
